Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.geometry.estimators.Line2DRobustEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use Line2DRobustEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures

    • Uses of Line2DRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators declared as Line2DRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected Line2DRobustEstimatorListener Line2DRobustEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that return Line2DRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Line2DRobustEstimatorListener Line2DRobustEstimator.getListener()
      Returns reference to listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators with parameters of type Line2DRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and default robust estimator method.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and default estimator method.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and lines and default robust estimator method.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points and default estimator method.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points.
      static Line2DRobustEstimator Line2DRobustEstimator.create​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a 2D line robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points.
      void Line2DRobustEstimator.setListener​(Line2DRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Sets listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
